creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
Three comments:

1) @DES: The Piwik release maintainer has rerolled releases many times - just
check the PR history for Piwik. See for example ports/171685 
I have told them to stop doing this to no help.

2) I have compared the new tar ball with the one I used when creating
the PR and the changes are benign/good - improved handling of bogus plugins
in core/Plugin/Manager.php 

3) @miwi: Thx a lot for commiting this and ports/185671, but it seems
my comment about USE_PHP was unnoticed and the addition from DES is
missing. Should I file another PR to get the wanted USE_PHP?

    USE_PHP= ctype dom filter gd hash iconv json session xml zlib

Regards,
Hans
